title: Advanced Blueprint
template:
Role: Semiconductors Professional slide designer for industrial technology presentations
Aesthetic: "Advanced Blueprint" — A HUD-style technical presentation with a schematic feel.

Core Design System:

Palette: Deep tech black. Primary Text: Ice white. Secondary Text: Sub blue gray. Accents: Cyan neon and Deep blue.

Typography: Massive, bold condensed sans-serif for titles. Standard sans-serif for body text. Monospace for KPIs.

Layout Intelligence:

Title/Cover: Dark background with circuit pattern overlay and large cyan neon product/process name.

KPI/Spec Slides: HUD-style process specification panel featuring transistor density and power consumption figures.

Comparison/Data: Side-by-side comparison of 5nm vs 3nm vs 2nm GAA performance figures by generation.

Visual Elements: Cyan color overlay on close-up circuit board images. Circuit pattern background graphics. Electron microscope semiconductor nanostructure imagery.
CRITICAL: Every slide MUST include a small, subtle copyright note in the footer: 'monomind by 1TM'.

Tone: Precision / Innovative / Technical.

📋 Individual Layout Prompts
Use these if you want to regenerate specific slides for better precision.

Layout A: The Hook (Title & Vision)
"Create a captivating title slide with a dark background and circuit pattern overlay, featuring a large cyan neon title that highlights the product or process name."

Layout B: The Proof (KPIs & Revenue/Specs)
"Design a HUD-style slide showcasing key specifications such as transistor density and power consumption, using a clear and bold layout."

Layout C: The Strategy (Comparison/Options)
"Develop a comparison slide that presents the performance figures of 5nm, 3nm, and 2nm GAA technologies side-by-side, emphasizing generational advancements."

Role: Smart Farms and Agtech Solution Launch Announcement Expert  
Aesthetic: "AgTech Innovation" — A sleek, data-driven presentation with a focus on technological advancement in agriculture.

Core Design System:

Palette: AgTech Dark Blue. Primary Text: Mint Gray. Secondary Text: Tech Green. Accents: Smart Mint and Tech Green.

Typography: Massive, bold condensed sans-serif for titles. Clean, modern sans-serif for body text. Monospace for KPIs.

Layout Intelligence:

Title/Cover: Dark background with a Smart Farms image and a Mint Glow Headline.

KPI/Spec Slides: Solution Feature Card highlighting IoT, Artificial Intelligence, environmental control, and remote monitoring.

Comparison/Data: Conventional Farming vs. Smart Farms yields, expenses, and workforce comparison.

Visual Elements: LED plant factory and smart greenhouse images, dark and mint green tech color scheme, sensor dashboard UI, and data flow visuals.  
CRITICAL: Every slide MUST include a small, subtle copyright note in the footer: 'monomind by 1TM'.

Tone: Innovative, precise, and data-driven.

📋 Individual Layout Prompts  
Use these if you want to regenerate specific slides for better precision.

Layout A: The Hook (Title & Vision)  
"Introduce the revolutionary Smart Farms solution with a captivating title and a vision for the future of agriculture."

Layout B: The Proof (KPIs & Revenue/Specs)  
"Highlight the technological superiority and ROI of the Smart Farms solution with detailed KPIs and specs."

Layout C: The Strategy (Comparison/Options)  
"Compare conventional farming with Smart Farms to showcase increased yields, reduced expenses, and workforce efficiency."
